response.justification: Candidate is a skilled full-stack software craftsman with ~13-15 years of varied experience across web, mobile, embedded, and GIS systems, plus some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, this role demands a Director-level individual contributor with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud-scale strategic influence — none of which are evidenced. The resume shows Senior/Staff IC scope, no advanced AI degree, no track record of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI product direction at the level required for a Principal Engineer in AI strategy.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack background spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks
Strong software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based) with community teaching and workshop experience
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at the scale this Principal/Director-IC role requires
No demonstrated cloud or AI strategy leadership, customer advisory work, or org-wide technical influence
Missing preferred Master's/PhD in AI and no entrepreneurial/intrapreneurial track record inside large organizations

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and shipped AI products
Seniority and scope below Principal/Director-IC level
Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling exposure at re:cinq
